Name: Kevin Martini
Company: Martini Mortgage Group (Gold Star Mortgage Financial Group)
Title: Certified Mortgage Advisor / Producing Branch Manager
LI_Connection_Request: Hey Kevin — I build lead intelligence tools for mortgage teams. We score NC investment property owners and deliver ranked dossiers with verified contact data. Think it could be a solid pipeline channel for your Raleigh team. Would love to connect.
LI_DM_1: Thanks for connecting, Kevin. Quick question — how does your team at Martini Mortgage Group (Gold Star Mortgage Financial Group) currently source investment property leads? Mostly realtor referrals and repeat clients, or do you have a dedicated investor pipeline?
LI_DM_2:
Reason I ask — I built a system that pulls public property records across NC, scores owners by investment signals (portfolio size, entity structure, equity, acquisition pace), resolves LLCs back to real people, and enriches with verified contact data. Here's what a typical output looks like — 3 demo profiles showing property count, entity structure, scoring signals, and equity estimates. The full version includes verified phone, email, mortgage history, and wealth indicators.

Worth a 15-min call this week to walk through it?
Email_1_Subject: New lead channel for your Martini Mortgage Group (Gold Star Mortgage Financial Group) team?
Email_1_Body:
Hi Kevin,

I used to run marketing for the largest mortgage origination team in the US. One thing I saw constantly: LOs fighting over the same realtor relationships and recycled property lists.

I built a different kind of lead channel — a system that scores investment property owners in NC by real signals (portfolio size, entity structure, equity, acquisition pace) and delivers contact-ready dossiers with verified phone, email, and financing intel.

For branch managers, the value is a pipeline channel you can offer your team that nobody else in Raleigh has. Would a sample dossier for the Raleigh market be useful?

— Zack Lewis
Still Mind Creative
Email_2_Subject: Re: New lead channel for your Martini Mortgage Group (Gold Star Mortgage Financial Group) team?
Email_2_Body:
Hi Kevin, following up — I attached a sample of what the lead dossiers look like.

3 demo investor profiles from NC showing the depth of intel on each lead: property count, entity structure, equity estimates, refi signals. Full version includes verified phone + email + mortgage history.

Happy to generate a small batch for Raleigh if you want to see real leads your team could work. 15 min to walk through it?

— Zack
Email_3_Body:
Last note on this — I'm offering a pilot to the first few NC originators: 100 fully enriched investor dossiers for $500. One funded deal from the list covers it 6-25x over.

For a branch, that's a test run you can put in one LO's hands and see what happens. After that, monthly subscriptions start at $1,500/mo for 250 leads with ongoing refresh.

If timing isn't right, no worries. But if pipeline is ever a constraint for your team, happy to chat.

— Zack Lewis
Still Mind Creative, LLC

LI_Connection_Request: Hey Jon — I build lead intelligence tools for mortgage teams. We score NC investment property owners and deliver ranked dossiers with verified contact data. Think it could be a solid pipeline channel for your Charlotte team. Would love to connect.
LI_DM_1: Thanks for connecting, Jon. Quick question — how does your team at Edge Home Finance currently source investment property leads? Mostly realtor referrals and repeat clients, or do you have a dedicated investor pipeline?
LI_DM_2:
Reason I ask — I built a system that pulls public property records across NC, scores owners by investment signals (portfolio size, entity structure, equity, acquisition pace), resolves LLCs back to real people, and enriches with verified contact data. We identified 65,000+ Tier 1 investor leads in Wake and Mecklenburg alone.

For branch managers, the interesting part is this becomes a lead channel you can offer your LOs — something most shops can't provide. Happy to show you a sample dossier if you're curious.
LI_DM_3:
Here's what a typical output looks like — 3 demo profiles showing property count, entity structure, scoring signals, and equity estimates. The full version includes verified phone, email, mortgage history, and wealth indicators.

I'm offering a pilot to a few NC originators — 100 fully enriched investor dossiers for $500. If even one converts to a funded deal, that's 6-25x ROI.

Worth a 15-min call this week to walk through it?
Email_1_Subject: New lead channel for your Edge Home Finance team?
Email_1_Body:
Hi Jon,

I used to run marketing for the largest mortgage origination team in the US. One thing I saw constantly: LOs fighting over the same realtor relationships and recycled property lists.

I built a different kind of lead channel — a system that scores investment property owners in NC by real signals (portfolio size, entity structure, equity, acquisition pace) and delivers contact-ready dossiers with verified phone, email, and financing intel.

For branch managers, the value is a pipeline channel you can offer your team that nobody else in Charlotte has. Would a sample dossier for the Charlotte market be useful?

— Zack Lewis
Still Mind Creative
Email_2_Subject: Re: New lead channel for your Edge Home Finance team?
Email_2_Body:
Hi Jon, following up — I attached a sample of what the lead dossiers look like.

3 demo investor profiles from NC showing the depth of intel on each lead: property count, entity structure, equity estimates, refi signals. Full version includes verified phone + email + mortgage history.

Happy to generate a small batch for Charlotte if you want to see real leads your team could work. 15 min to walk through it?

— Zack
Email_3_Body:
Last note on this — I'm offering a pilot to the first few NC originators: 100 fully enriched investor dossiers for $500. One funded deal from the list covers it 6-25x over.

For a branch, that's a test run you can put in one LO's hands and see what happens. After that, monthly subscriptions start at $1,500/mo for 250 leads with ongoing refresh.

If timing isn't right, no worries. But if pipeline is ever a constraint for your team, happy to chat.

— Zack Lewis
Still Mind Creative, LLC

Email_1_Body:
Hi Sabrina,

I used to run marketing for the largest mortgage origination team in the US. One thing I saw constantly: loan officers spending time and money on lead sources that are just recycled property records with no real intelligence.

I built something different — a system that scores investment property owners by actual signals (portfolio size, entity structure, equity, out-of-state ownership) and delivers contact-ready dossiers with verified phone and email.

Just deployed it in NC. Would a sample dossier for the Raleigh market be useful to you?

— Zack Lewis
Still Mind Creative
Email_2_Subject: Re: Quick question about your investor pipeline

If timing isn't right, no worries at all. But if pipeline is ever a constraint, happy to chat.
